name: ageha734
description: A dynamic README.md for your GitHub Profile.
author: ageha734 <contact@ageha734.jp>

scripts.lockgen:cv-api: docker run --rm $(docker build -q -f cv-api/Dockerfile cv-api) sh -lc 'cat /app/pnpm-lock.yaml' > cv-api/pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.lockgen:e2e: docker run --rm $(docker build -q -f e2e/Dockerfile e2e) sh -lc 'cat /app/pnpm-lock.yaml' > e2e/pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.e2e: docker compose -f compose.e2e.yml down && docker compose -f compose.e2e.yml up --build -d cv-api sync portfolio && docker compose -f compose.e2e.yml --profile setup run --rm setup && docker compose -f compose.e2e.yml up --no-recreate --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from e2e e2e
